    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static AuthChallenge
    AuthChallenge.anonymous()
    Creates an AuthChallenge representing anonymous access (no auth required).
    static AuthChallenge
    AuthChallenge.discover(org.apache.http.impl.client.CloseableHttpClient httpClient, String registryEndpoint)
    Discovers authentication requirements by pinging the registry.
    static AuthChallenge
    AuthChallenge.parse(String header)
    Parses a WWW-Authenticate header value.
